title: anthyllis oreigenes
intro: Anthyllis oreigenes, also known as kidney vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis oreigenes include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney problems, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
